description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. Four accent pillows in various shades of brown and gray, along with a plush toy, are arranged on the seating area, adding visual interest and comfort. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The base of the sofa is low and appears to be supported by a recessed platform, making the legs nearly invisible. The overall look is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray sofa with straight padded armrests, three large seat and back cushions, and several accent pillows. The design is minimalist and boxy, with a low, recessed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, three seat and back cushions, four accent pillows, and a plush toy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of pillows along the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the tops of the accent pillows and plush toy peeking over the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest profile and the arrangement of pillows from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size, with four varied accent pillows and a plush toy placed on top.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa appears to rest on a low, recessed platform base, giving it a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, with three loose back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
